name: messaging-system
description: Repository meta only — each app under apps/ has its own package.json, node_modules, and package-lock.json.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/web-client && npm install --prefix apps/messaging-service
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --prefix apps/web-client && npm run lint --prefix apps/messaging-service
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/web-client && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/messaging-service
scripts.format:check:all: npm run format:check --prefix apps/web-client && npm run format:check --prefix apps/messaging-service
